turns.name: WILLIAM H. REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the court number 02-258, Jinks against Richland County will be announced by Justice Scalia.

turns.name: ANTONIN SCALIA
turns.text: This case is here on certiorari to the Supreme Court of South Carolina. For the reasons set forth in an opinion filed with the Clerk of the Court today, we reverse the judgment of the Supreme Court of South Carolina and remand for proceedings not inconsistent with our opinion. The Court's decision is unanimous. Justice Souter has filed a concurring opinion.
